description_long: This grinder features a compact, industrial design with a sturdy rectangular base supporting a central grinding mechanism. A prominent circular grinding wheel is mounted on one side, partially shielded by a metallic guard, and connected to a visible axle and support structure. The main body is constructed from metallic materials, with several bolts and fasteners securing the components. A small, upright handle is attached near the grinding wheel, likely for manual operation or adjustment. The color palette is dominated by metallic gray, black, and some red and brass accents on functional parts. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty grinding tasks in urban workshops or garages.
description: A compact, metallic grinder with a circular grinding wheel, sturdy base, and visible handle, featuring gray, black, and red accents. The design is robust and industrial, suitable for urban workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular base, central grinding mechanism, and upright handle with the grinding wheel partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the circular grinding wheel and its guard, with the axle and support structure clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the base and grinding mechanism, with the grinding wheel mostly obscured.
description_view_3: View from the side of the grinding wheel, emphasizing the wheel's profile and the supporting guard structure.
attribute_handle_design: A single upright handle is positioned near the grinding wheel, featuring a straight, cylindrical shape for grip. The handle appears to be made of metal with no visible textured or ergonomic enhancements.
